title: Spacious 2-Bedroom Apartments in Charlottesville: Walk to UVA Law & Barracks Road
description:
Our two-bedroom apartments at The Jeffersonian deliver the perfect balance of space, comfort, and ultimate convenience in Charlottesville, VA. Designed with graduate students, roommates, and working professionals in mind, this thoughtfully designed floor plan is located within a short walking distance to the UVA School of Law, Darden, and premier local shopping.

Inside Your 2-Bedroom Home
Each two-bedroom apartment is optimized for comfortable, everyday living, offering a layout that maximizes both privacy and shared spaces:

Bright, Open Living Areas: Generous natural light and a spacious central layout ideal for studying, working from home, or entertaining guests.

Fully Equipped Kitchens: Functional kitchens featuring modern appliances and plenty of cabinet space for meal prep.

Private Patio or Balcony: Your own personal outdoor retreat to seamlessly extend your living space.

Access to Community Perks: Enjoy the convenience of our on-site laundry facilities and unbeatable pedestrian access directly to Barracks Road Shopping Center.

Ready to secure your two-bedroom apartment? View our current availability, apply online today, or call us to schedule a personal walkthrough of this exceptional floor plan!




 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $2,175 



 Admin Fee: $250 

 Application Fee: $60 

 Security Deposit: $500 


 Available 8/10/26
